raw: Please redeem this pass at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody Admission desks to receive 50% off regular museum admission rates up to 4 persons per coupon. Includes access to all four HMSC museums. At least one member of party must be a MA resident. For additional information, please visit hmsc.harvard.edu/visit . Please check museum days/hours open before going to museum. * Funded by the Friends of the WPL
